name: Report — voucher issuance vs redemption by day

properties.sql:
WITH issued AS (
         SELECT to_char(datecreated, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS d, count(*) AS n
         FROM app_fd_im_voucher WHERE datecreated IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d
       ),
       redeemed AS (
         SELECT to_char(c_redeemed_at::timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS d, count(*) AS n
         FROM app_fd_im_voucher WHERE c_status='redeemed' AND c_redeemed_at IS NOT NULL AND c_redeemed_at != ''
         GROUP BY d
       ),
       all_days AS (
         SELECT d FROM issued UNION SELECT d FROM redeemed
       )
       SELECT all_days.d AS day,
              COALESCE(issued.n, 0)::text   AS issued_count,
              COALESCE(redeemed.n, 0)::text AS redeemed_count
       FROM all_days
       LEFT JOIN issued   ON all_days.d = issued.d
       LEFT JOIN redeemed ON all_days.d = redeemed.d
       ORDER BY day
